title: Application - Update from previous app version while using guest account (TBD)
scenario: App update fails or causes unexpected behavior when performed while logged into a guest account
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure the app is currently signed in using a Guest account.
3. Navigate to the Google Play Store and check for available updates for the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. If an update is available, tap 'Update' to install the latest version of the app.
5. Wait for the update to complete and the app to re-launch or be manually opened.
6. Observe the app's state after the update.
expected: The app should successfully update and launch. The Guest account session should be preserved, and the user should remain logged in as Guest without any data loss or forced sign-in prompt.
